'''Osted Alater''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the ''[[Crusader's Shield]]''. In the early days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Alater was sent by [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Paro Lanto]] to investigate the dealings of [[Planetary Safaris Inc.]], a business that specialized in providing challenging hunts across exotic worlds. On one such worlds, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]], hunting parties were being routinely lost or decimated by the wild beasts on the planet. Under the [[Dangerous Species Act]], it was legal for these beasts to be eliminated to prevent danger to Imperial occupation. However, when Alater began to observe these "wild beasts" he learned that [[Barabel/Legends|they]] were actually a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] race. Because the Dangerous Species Act did not apply to sentient beings, he had Planetary Safaris shut down for unscrupulous dealings.

In honor of Captain Alater's actions, the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabels]] built [[Alater-ka]], the planet's main spaceport and eventual capital.
